song.title: Mighty To Save
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C B C E
song.lyrics:
[V1] . C G Em 1) Everyone needs compassion,| Love that's never failing . D C G Let mercy fall on me,| Everyone needs forgiveness . Em D C D C D The kindness of a Savior,| The hope of nations
[C] Chorus . G D Savior, He can move the mountains . C G Em D My God is mighty to save,| He is mighty to save . G D Forever, Author of salvation . C G He rose and conquered the grave . Em D Jesus conquered the grave
[V2] . C G Em 2) So take me as You find me,| All my fears and failures . D C G Fill my life again,| I give my life to follow . Em D C D C D Everything I believe in,| Now I surrender
[B] Bridge .C G D Em Shine your light, And let the whole world see . C G D Em We're singing for the glory, Of the risen King Jesus .C G D Em Shine your light, And let the whole world see . C G D We're singing for the glory, Of the risen King
[E] 1) Everyone needs compassion, Love that's never failing Let mercy fall on me, Everyone needs forgiveness The kindness of a Savior, The hope of nations Chorus Savior, He can move the mountains My God is mighty to save, He is mighty to save Forever, Author of salvation He rose and conquered the grave Jesus conquered the grave 2) So take me as You find me, All my fears and failures Fill my life again, I give my life to follow Everything I believe in, Now I surrender Bridge Shine your light, And let the whole world see We're singing for the glory, Of the risen King Jesus Shine your light, And let the whole world see We're singing for the glory, Of the risen King
